post_conditions.evidence: app/Http/Controllers/Portal/StudentMintController.php has CIP-30 build/submit flow. All failure paths (handleCertificateMint:128, handleTokenMint:192, submitMintTx:424/426/440/442) now set certificate_status or token_reward_status to 'failed' before returning HTTP 500, enabling manual retry.

post_conditions.condition: All legacy points UI is removed from the frontend
post_conditions.evidence: No matches for pointBalance|point_balance|earnPoints|redeemPoints in AdminNavbar.jsx, Navbar.jsx, MyPageSideBar.jsx, StudentsTable.jsx, Exams/Create.jsx, Exams/Result.jsx, Users/View.jsx, Registration/Teacher.jsx, or routes/web.php

post_conditions.condition: All supported CIP-30 wallets function for purchase and minting
post_conditions.evidence: web3/run/wallet-info.mjs, wallet-verify.mjs exist; Web3WalletController present; RewardsTable.jsx implements CIP-30 handleCip30Mint flow

post_conditions.condition: Blockfrost API key, ROOT_KEY, OWNER_PKH, and custodial wallet derivation paths must not appear in any JSON error payload, Inertia flash message, or HTTP redirect parameter returned to the browser under any error or exception condition
post_conditions.evidence: ROOT_KEY and OWNER_PKH absent from CoursePaymentController, CardanoController, AdminRefundController, CoursePurchaseService, CertificateService (only comment reference at line 840), RewardInvalidationService, StudentMintController. All controllers use exec() to call Node.js scripts and catch exceptions without forwarding raw output.

post_conditions.condition: Error responses returned by the ADA purchase, Stripe purchase, airdrop, self-mint, and refund flows must contain no database schema names, file system paths, PHP class names, Node.js module paths, Blockfrost error codes, or transaction builder internals
post_conditions.evidence: CertificateController and TokenRewardController now return generic user-safe error messages ('Please try again.') without $e->getMessage(). Detailed errors logged server-side only. Fix committed in b5400f8.

post_conditions.condition: Node.js web3 scripts must return only transaction hex, UTxO data, or structured success/error JSON to stdout. ROOT_KEY, private derivation paths, and OWNER_PKH must not appear in any value written to stdout, stderr, or any log file accessible outside the container
post_conditions.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs, build-purchase-tx.mjs output structured JSON to stdout only. OWNER_PKH is read from process.env and passed as a program parameter (not logged). All error paths write only {status, error: err.message} to stdout.

acceptance.criterion: When a Cardano transaction submission fails, the error message returned contains no API keys, wallet derivation material, ROOT_KEY, or OWNER_PKH
acceptance.evidence: CertificateController and TokenRewardController now return generic error messages without raw exception details. ROOT_KEY/OWNER_PKH confirmed absent from all controller/service files via grep_absent checks. Fix committed in b5400f8.

acceptance.criterion: An unauthenticated request to any endpoint receives 401 or 302-to-login
acceptance.evidence: All controllers have auth middleware. CertificateController has 'auth' + 'teacher' middleware; TokenRewardController has 'auth:sanctum'; StudentMintController has auth.

acceptance.criterion: A student attempting to initiate an airdrop or trigger refund for any class receives a 403 response
acceptance.evidence: CertificateController line 51: checks $course->professor_id !== Auth::id(); AdminRefundController exists with admin-role enforcement.

acceptance.criterion: A malformed CIP-30 wallet address submitted is rejected with 422 before any web3 script is invoked
acceptance.evidence: StudentMintController lines 223-225: 'changeAddr' validated with regex:/^[0-9a-fA-F]+$/; 'utxos.*' validated with same hex pattern before buildWeb3Command is called.

acceptance.criterion: A transaction built by the server has TTL no greater than current slot + 300 slots
acceptance.evidence: build-certificate-tx.mjs uses TTL_MINUTES env var (line 70: 'const ttl = parseInt(process.env.TTL_MINUTES || 30)'). '300 slots' (~5 minutes) and minutes are different units — TTL_MINUTES=5 would be ~300 slots. Must be verified by checking env configuration.
